alse,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7615821068774689816","book_info":{"abstract":"他退隐了十年。
十年前，谢文东统一全国黑道，建立文东会商业帝国，随后销声匿迹。没有人知道那个戴金丝眼镜的狠人去哪儿了，江湖只留下传说。
十年后，他唯一的儿子谢念祖，一个叛逆的18岁少年，被网上的“朋友”骗至缅北，关进了KK园区——那个连当地人都谈之色变的电诈魔窟。白家、魏家、刘家、明家，果敢四大家族瓜分着这里的每一块骨头。
勒索电话打来时，谢文东正在给孙子挑满月礼物。
他没有报警。他只是打了几个电话。
三天后，高强从安保公司调出最精锐的兄弟，李爽推掉所有应酬拎着刀赶来，张研江连夜调动境外资金，刘波的情报网铺向缅北。三眼从老家打电话来，声音沙哑：“东哥，这一次我必须跟着去。”
缅北的丛林里，抖音主播小六意外拍到谢念祖被押送的画面。过气港星阿威在园区里被打得半死，哭着说“我以为我红过他们不敢动我”。白家老二白应苍对着镜头嚣张叫嚣：“听说他爸是大人物？让他来！”
他来了。
那个当年从东北打遍全国的男人，时隔二十年再次拿起刀。不是为了江山，不是为了兄弟，是为了儿子。
那就让你们看看什么叫王者归来","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/4ce707aa1aac80ddbf508946abf0c7b9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"龙城岁月静美","author_id":"","book_id":"7615821068774689816","book_name":"坏蛋再出山","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2127人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":92,"name":"腹黑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=92&name=腹黑&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":1058,"name":"综影视","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1058&name=综影视&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"},{"category_id":846,"name":"黑化","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=846&name=黑化&genre_type=0&gender=2&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7615821368055054872","read_count":"2127","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"374677"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"97","tags":"都市日常,综影视,腹黑,黑化","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4ce707aa1aac80ddbf508946abf0c7b9~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779270545&x-signature=n%2FMAON7SuLL%2FjiGV%2BseblrmU4pI%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2326208039894446","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"32"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032117490528F1F0EC810398E80EAE"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":9272,"read_book_count":0,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":48},"user_action":{"author":1,"author_digg_time":1773845728,"author_reply_time":1773845741,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4
